examples: Tom's whole class were of a pattern--restless, noisy, and troublesome.
When it does rain, it tends to be a very light rain that isn't troublesome.
It was a tedious and troublesome piece of work, but he finished it at last.
Now, instead of remaining a troublesome expense item, they become an increasingly valuable asset.
Even more troublesome, those smooth curves going up, then down, turn out to be misleading.
